Poseidon Networking — VPN Tunnels

Poseidon Networking uses WireGuard for site-to-site and client-to-site VPN tunnels. Public/private keypairs identify peers; AllowedIPs lists scope each tunnel's reachable networks. Key rotation runs every 90 days. Endpoint discovery uses a lightweight UDP handshake before tunnel setup. Poseidon Networking WireGuard tunnels carry site-to-site and client-to-site traffic. Poseidon Networking peer keypairs identify endpoints; AllowedIPs scopes each tunnel's reachable subnets.
